top_signals.title: Iran-Linked Tankers U-Turn and Zig-Zag as US Enforces Blockade
top_signals.summary: Two US-sanctioned tankers carrying cooking fuel are U-turning and zig-zagging in the Gulf of Oman and Arabian Sea, part of a flotilla of vessels laden with Iranian energy exports that are facing an aggressive US blockade of the country’s shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Slide With Futures as Chip Selloff Deepens: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell for a second day as investors rotated out of technology shares, deepening a selloff in chipmakers after the sector’s blistering rally earlier this year. Equity-index futures pointed to further losses.
